views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main hub showing today's habit checklist with completion ring, active streaks for each habit, and a motivational streak-at-risk warning. Quick-tap to mark habits done without opening entry sheet.

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Log a habit completion with duration, quality rating, time of day, and optional reflection. Pre-fills habit name if tapped from dashboard checklist.

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: GitHub-style heatmap calendar showing completion density per day, with scrollable date-grouped list of all entries below. Filter by habit or category.

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Deep insights: completion rate trends over weeks, per-habit streak leaderboard, category distribution pie chart, best time-of-day analysis, and AI-generated consistency insights.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayCompletedCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of habits marked completed today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayCompletionRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage of unique habits completed today vs total tracked habits (0.0-1.0)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days with at least one habit completed, ending today or yesterday

viewModelComputedProperties.name: longestStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All-time longest consecutive-day streak across the entire history

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyCompletionRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average daily completion rate over the last 7 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: previousWeekCompletionRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average daily completion rate for days 8-14 ago, used for trend comparison

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyTrendDirection
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Compares weeklyCompletionRate vs previousWeekCompletionRate: returns up/down/stable with percentage change

viewModelComputedProperties.name: habitStreaks
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Per-habit current streak sorted descending — powers the streak leaderboard

viewModelComputedProperties.name: mostConsistentHabit
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Habit with highest completion rate over last 30 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: streakAtRisk
viewModelComputedProperties.description: True if today has zero completions and current time is past 6 PM — triggers motivational nudge

viewModelComputedProperties.name: completionsByCategory
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total completions grouped by category for pie/bar chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyHeatmapData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Last 12 weeks of daily completion counts for the heatmap calendar grid

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageSessionQuality
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean quality rating across all entries with duration > 0

viewModelComputedProperties.name: bestTimeOfDay
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Time of day with highest average quality rating — reveals optimal routine timing

viewModelComputedProperties.name: uniqueHabitsTracked
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of distinct habit names ever logged

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of generated insight strings: streak milestones, consistency trends, time-of-day recommendations, category balance alerts

dailyGoal.description: Target number of habits to complete each day. User configurable. Completion ring fills based on completedToday / dailyGoal.

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A streak day requires completing at least 1 habit. The global streak counts consecutive calendar days with ≥1 completion. Per-habit streaks count consecutive days that specific habit was logged as completed. A missed day resets the streak to 0.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Compare this week's average daily completion rate against last week's. Per-habit: compute 7-day rolling completion percentage and flag habits dropping below 50%. Track session quality trends to detect burnout (declining quality despite consistent completion).
insights: Streak milestone celebrations: 7, 14, 21, 30, 50, 100, 365 day markers with contextual messages
Consistency leader: highlight the habit with highest 30-day completion rate
Falling behind alert: flag habits with >50% drop in weekly frequency vs prior week
Optimal timing: recommend time of day with highest quality ratings for each habit
Category balance: warn if >80% of completions are in a single category, suggest diversification
Weekend vs weekday: compare completion patterns and surface differences
New habit momentum: for habits <14 days old, encourage maintaining the initial push
